creator: jrhett@netconsonance.com
text:
I approve.  I opened it, yah?  ;-)

FWIW, there's already been some changes I'd like to make - new version  
3.0.2 which fixes some of the things we were manually patching in the  
port - so if I can send you another patch against this before submit  
that would be good.

On Feb 5, 2009, at 12:40 PM, Boris Samorodov wrote:
> Jo, please approve this PR. Repocopy is needed to create a new
> port sysutils/cfengine3 which you have been submitted. Thanks!
>
> WBR
> -- 
> bsam

-- 
Jo Rhett
Net Consonance : consonant endings by net philanthropy, open source  
and other randomness
